chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1528 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.7593/2023 (stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.03.2023 Mr. Adnan Ali Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ayazuddin Qureshi, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the Appeal before the Commissioner Inland Revenue [Appeals-I], Large Taxpayer Unit, Karachi. Learned counsel for petitioner and Assistant Attorney General jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue [Appeals-I], Large Taxpayer Unit, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
